commands.purpose: Table view of marketing_events. Filterable by tenant, event_type, status, date range, provider (via delivery join), subject_type. Default limit 100; use --limit=0 for stream mode.
Verbose read of one event: base fields + attribution snapshot + consent snapshot + per-provider delivery ledger + retry timeline. Support tool for investigating a specific conversion loss.

Manual re-dispatch of an existing event. --force bypasses the terminal-status check (audit-critical). Prompts for confirmation unless --no-interaction. Idempotent when the provider supports the event_id contract.
Delivery ledger view. Filterable by tenant, event_id, provider, status (succeeded / failed / rate_limited / suppressed_*), date range. Powers support debugging.
Dead-letter queue view. --unresolved filters to open items. Sorted by created_at DESC (newest first).

Enqueue a fresh DispatchToProviderJob for a dead-lettered delivery with attempt_number=1. --note is required and written to the audit trail. Increments replay_attempts. Successful replay auto-resolves the dead-letter.

Manually mark a dead-letter resolved WITHOUT replaying. --note required. Used when the provider event was replayed manually via provider dashboard OR when the loss is intentional (e.g. the tenant deleted the underlying subscription).
Provider config view. --active filters is_active=true; --test-mode filters test_mode=true. Shows circuit-breaker state per row.

Scriptable provider config create/update. --config-file=path/to/config.json is validated against the per-provider JSON schema. --dry-run validates + shows diff without persisting. Encrypts the config at rest.

Send a synthetic test event via the provider's sandbox endpoint. Reports success/failure with provider response details. Used by ops to validate a tenant's provider config without disturbing production conversion counts.
Manually reset an OPEN circuit breaker. Sets circuit_breaker_open_until=NULL + consecutive_failure_count=0 + increments circuit_breaker_reset_count. --note is required and written to the audit trail.
Compliance report. Counts events + deliveries suppressed by consent, grouped by (event_type, missing_consent_category). Used by DPO for GDPR Art. 6(1)(a) evidence.

Aggregated ROAS numbers by campaign. Sums value_amount_cents from delivered events grouped by attribution.utm_source + utm_campaign. --format=table|json|csv. Enterprise-tier tenants get 10-year history.

One-shot invocation of ReconcileMarketingEventStatusJob. Rolls up per-event delivery aggregates + updates marketing_events.status. --dry-run reports findings without repairing. Findings above 0 indicate stuck events from crashed dispatch jobs.
